ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the simulation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the simulation */,
  "initial_num_nodes" INTEGER /* Initial number of nodes in the network */,
  "initial_num_edges" INTEGER /* Initial number of edges in the network */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the simulation */,
  "total_steps" INTEGER /* Total number of steps in the simulation */,
  "final_num_nodes" INTEGER /* Final number of nodes in the network */,
  "final_num_edges" INTEGER /* Final number of edges in the network */,
  "elapsed_time" TEXT /* Total elapsed time of the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_steps" (
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each step within a simulation */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation this step belongs to */,
  "timestep" INTEGER /* Time step of the simulation */,
  "num_nodes" INTEGER /* Number of nodes in the network at this step */,
  "num_edges" INTEGER /* Number of edges in the network at this step */,
  "average_degree" REAL /* Average degree of the network at this step */,
  "max_degree" INTEGER /* Maximum degree of the network at this step */,
  "num_triangles" INTEGER /* Number of triangles in the network at this step */,
  "new_edges" INTEGER /* Number of new edges added at this step */,
  "step_duration" TEXT /* Duration of this step */,
  "total_triangles" INTEGER /* Total number of triangles formed up to this step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_steps_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the node belongs to */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name or label of the node */,
  "degree" INTEGER /* Degree of the node at its creation */,
  "creation_time" TEXT /* Time the node was created in the simulation */,
  "last_degree_update_time" TEXT /* Last time the node's degree was updated */,
  "last_position" TEXT /* Last known position of the node in the network */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nodes_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "edges" (
  "edge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each edge */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the edge belongs to */,
  "from_node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the starting node of the edge */,
  "to_node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ending node of the edge */,
  "creation_time" TEXT /* Time the edge was created in the simulation */,
  "last_update_time" TEXT /* Last time the edge was updated */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the edge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_edges_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network metric entry */,
  "step_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation step this metric belongs to */,
  "average_degree" REAL /* Average degree of the network at this step */,
  "max_degree" INTEGER /* Maximum degree of the network at this step */,
  "num_triangles" INTEGER /* Number of triangles in the network at this step */,
  "clustering_coefficient" REAL /* Clustering coefficient of the network at this step */,
  "connected_components" INTEGER /* Number of connected components in the network at this step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_metrics_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("step_id") REFERENCES simulation_steps ("step_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user this permission is assigned to */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation this permission applies to */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  "expiration_time" TEXT /* Expiration time of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation this report is based on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "generation_time" TEXT /* Time the report was generated */,
  "last_modified_time" TEXT /* Last time the report was modified */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation this visualization is based on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the visualization */,
  "last_modified_time" TEXT /* Last time the visualization was modified */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* File type of the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "triangles" (
  "triangle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each triangle */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the triangle belongs to */,
  "node1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first node in the triangle */,
  "node2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second node in the triangle */,
  "node3_id" INTEGER /* ID of the third node in the triangle */,
  "formation_time" TEXT /* Time the triangle was formed in the simulation */,
  "last_update_time" TEXT /* Last time the triangle was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("triangle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_triangles_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "edge_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each edge change */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation this change belongs to */,
  "edge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the edge that changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., addition, removal) */,
  "change_time" TEXT /* Time the change occurred */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_edge_changes_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_edge_changes_edge_id FOREIGN KEY ("edge_id") REFERENCES edges ("edge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node change */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation this change belongs to */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node that changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., addition, removal) */,
  "change_time" TEXT /* Time the change occurred */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_changes_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_changes_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation this parameter applies to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_parameters_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation result */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation this result belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the result */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of result (e.g., metric, finding) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)
